blockers_and_limits.detail: systemd's journal_file_fss_load() looks for /var/log/journal/<machine-id>/fss; this worker did not patch that path or write host journal state, so sealed/sealed-continuous systemd-generated files were recorded as infeasible in this slice
the committed matrix framework exists, but the systemd internal generator helper is copied only into .local systemd source checkouts; upstream systemd source trees are not modified

v258.8.fss: not-generated: systemd fss loader hardcodes /var/log/journal/<machine>/fss; repository boundary forbids that host-state write

v260.2.fss: not-generated: systemd fss loader hardcodes /var/log/journal/<machine>/fss; repository boundary forbids that host-state write

sensitive_data_policy: reports contain synthetic case IDs, counts, digests, feature flags, statuses, command output hashes, and no raw journal payload values
